acceptanceCriteria: `PriceBadge` component is exported from `packages/web/src/components/PriceBadge.tsx`
Props include `currentPrice: number`, `originalPrice?: number`, and `currency?: string` (default 'USD')
When originalPrice is provided and differs from currentPrice, it is displayed with line-through styling
Current price is displayed prominently
Component uses `cn` for className merging and accepts a `className` prop
`DiscountBadge` component is exported from `packages/web/src/components/DiscountBadge.tsx`
Props include `discount: number` (0-100 percentage value)
Displays formatted text like '-75%'
Color varies by discount depth (e.g., >=50% uses danger/red, >=25% uses warning/yellow, <25% uses success/green)
Accepts a `className` prop for external styling
`StoreIcon` component is exported from `packages/web/src/components/StoreIcon.tsx`
Props include `storeName: string`, `logoUrl?: string | null`, and `size?: number` (default 24)
Renders an `` tag with alt text when logoUrl is provided
Falls back to a styled text abbreviation (first 2 chars of storeName) when logoUrl is null/undefined
Accepts a `className` prop
`LoadingSpinner` is exported and renders an animated spinning indicator with an optional `size` prop
`EmptyState` is exported with `message: string` and optional `icon` prop, rendering centered placeholder content
`ErrorState` is exported with `message: string` and optional `onRetry?: () => void` prop; renders a retry button when onRetry is provided
All three components accept a `className` prop
All interactive elements (retry button) have visible focus states for keyboard accessibility
BuyButton renders as a styled anchor element with button-like appearance using design-system tokens
Includes visible keyboard focus states (focus-visible ring or outline)
Has `aria-label` attribute describing the action (e.g., 'Buy {game} on {storeName}')
Existing props interface (href, storeName) is preserved
Existing tests in BuyButton.test.tsx continue to pass (update tests only if necessary to accommodate new aria/styling attributes)
Component uses `cn` from `@/lib/utils` for className merging
payload.issueBody:
## Overview
Set up the frontend project with a component library, design system, shared layouts, and global conventions. All other frontend issues build on top of this.

## Tech Recommendations
- **Framework**: Next.js (App Router) — SSR/SSG for SEO, good DX
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (accessible, unstyled components)
- **State management**: React Query (TanStack Query) for server state; Zustand for minimal client state
- **Forms**: React Hook Form + Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts (lightweight, for price history charts)
- **Icons**: Lucide React

## Tasks

### Project Setup
- [ ] Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- [ ] Install and configure shadcn/ui
- [ ] Set up TanStack Query with global error/loading handling
- [ ] Set up Zustand store for auth state (access token, user profile)
- [ ] Configure API client (typed `fetch` wrapper that automatically sets `Authorization` header)

### Design System
- [ ] Define color palette: primary (brand), background, surface, muted, success, warning, danger
- [ ] Define typography scale (heading, body, caption, label)
- [ ] Create shared components:
  - `<GameCard>` — cover image, title, best price badge, discount badge
  - `<PriceBadge>` — shows current price + original price crossed out
  - `<DiscountBadge>` — shows "-75%" badge with color coding by discount depth
  - `<BuyButton>` — always uses referral URL from API
  - `<StoreIcon>` — logo for each store
  - `<LoadingSpinner>`, `<EmptyState>`, `<ErrorState>`

### Layout
- [ ] Root layout with: sticky header (logo, search bar, nav links, auth CTA), footer (links, affiliate disclosure), ad slots
- [ ] Responsive layout: full sidebar on desktop, hamburger menu on mobile
- [ ] SEO: default `<meta>` tags, Open Graph, JSON-LD for game pages
- [ ] Set up `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` (dynamically generated from game slugs)

### Accessibility
- [ ] All interactive elements have keyboard focus states
- [ ] Images have `alt` text
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA

## Acceptance Criteria
- `npm run dev` starts the frontend against the local API
- Reusable components render correctly in a component showcase (Storybook optional but nice)
- Lighthouse score ≥ 90 on Performance, Accessibility, SEO for the homepage

## Dependencies
- #1 Tech Stack Selection & Project Scaffolding
- #13 Core Game & Deals REST API
